mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.user_id AS userId, e.company_name AS companyName, e.industry, e.company_size AS companySize, e.company_address AS companyAddress, e.contact_person AS contactPerson, e.company_introduction AS companyIntroduction, e.verification_status AS verificationStatus, e.created_time AS createdTime, e.updated_time AS updatedTime, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.email, u.phone FROM enterprises e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id
AND e.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.companyName}, '%')
AND e.industry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.industry}, '%')
AND e.contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.contactPerson}, '%')
ORDER BY e.created_time DESC

SELECT e.id, e.user_id AS userId, e.company_name AS companyName, e.industry, e.company_size AS companySize, e.company_address AS companyAddress, e.contact_person AS contactPerson, e.company_introduction AS companyIntroduction, e.verification_status AS verificationStatus, e.created_time AS createdTime, e.updated_time AS updatedTime, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.email, u.phone FROM enterprises e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id WHERE e.id = #{id}

SELECT e.id, e.user_id AS userId, e.company_name AS companyName, e.industry, e.company_size AS companySize, e.company_address AS companyAddress, e.contact_person AS contactPerson, e.company_introduction AS companyIntroduction, e.verification_status AS verificationStatus, e.created_time AS createdTime, e.updated_time AS updatedTime, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.email, u.phone FROM enterprises e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
